Subject: A black haired boy
Event: The black haired boy sits quietly on a lonely bench in the cemetery, a tear slipping down his cheek as he looks across the tombstones, feeling the weight of loss around him.
story_prompts: The same A black haired boy stands hesitantly at the entrance of a quiet cemetery surrounded by bare trees under a gray sky.
The same A black haired boy slowly walks between scattered old tombstones, head bowed, with dry grass brushing against his feet.
The same A black haired boy sits down heavily on a worn wooden lonely bench, gazing ahead as a single tear rolls down the cheek.
The same A black haired boy leans forward on the lonely bench, hands clasped tightly, as the full scope of tombstones fills the background in mist.
